sp_widget.name: MSP Monitoring Dashboard
sp_widget.template:
${You do not have permission to see this content due to security constraints}
${Active Alarms}
${Now}
  • ${Disaster}
  • ${High Priority}
  • ${Average}
  • ${Warning}
  • ${Information}
{{data.total}}
${Equipments Health}
${Now}
  • ${msp_monitoring_down}
  • ${Up and running}
{{data.down}} ${msp_monitoring_down}
${Total Alarms}
{{formatDate()}}
{{data.totalAlarms}}
${Monitoring Coverage %}
${Environment}
  • {{data.unmonitored}} ${equipments not monitored}
  • {{data.monitored}} ${equipments monitored}
{{data.porcentage}}
